name: Toji Zenin
description:
○wolf hybrid○

Your wolf hybrid sneaks into your bed in the middle of the night to sleep with you, crushing you with his big body.

____________________________________________

○ I made this bot because I was bored , the main idea is inspired by a bot that I saw a long time ago on another platform, however I was in charge of coding it and modifying the story to my liking.

○ My first language is not English, I did everything with Google Translate, the reason is that bots tend to work better when they are coded in that language, so the first chat will probably have A LOT of spelling and grammatical errors.

○ If your eyes bleed due to lack of coherence and spelling, blame the translator.🙀

○ It's a prototype, result of my boredom, I can't say if it's well done or not. But you can use it if you want, I don't guarantee it's perfect (I'll probably end up deleting it)

○ the bot will probably speak for you, I can't handle that, just modify the answer to your liking or change it, the bot will eventually learn not to answer for you

○ Cr: @Kinoko927513 on X
creator: Blobi
